name: Ransomware: REvil IOC in Events
notes: This rule triggers when an IOC (Filename) related to REvil Ransomware, also known as Sodinokibi and Sodin, is observed.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created
when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '(qwe\.txt|h\.a\.n\.n\.a\.exe)' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Ransomware: REvil IOC in Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '(qwe\.txt|h\.a\.n\.n\.a\.exe)' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: An IOC (Filename) related to REvil Ransomware has been observed
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
